---
title: "Y. Tang"
# image: images/*.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  # image-width: 12em
  # image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: tangyu14@alumni.nudt.edu.cn
      href: mailto:tangyu14@alumni.nudt.edu.cn
    - icon: github
      text: TonyTangYu
      href: https://github.com/TonyTangYu
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org
---

:::: {#hero-heading}

I am currently an assistant researcher at the Information Support Force Engineering University. My research focuses on **large-scale deep learning training**, including model parallelism, memory optimization, and efficient training techniques.

## Research Interests

- Large-scale Deep Learning Training
- Model Parallelism and Pipeline Parallelism  
- Memory Optimization for Deep Learning
- Distributed Training Systems

## Education

- **Ph.D.** in Computer Science, National University of Defense Technology, 2021-2025
- **M.S.** in Computer Science, National University of Defense Technology, 2018-2020
- **B.S.** in Computer Science, National University of Defense Technology, 2014-2018

## Research Projects

- **Hubei Provincial Natural Science Foundation**: Efficient Pipeline Parallel Training Methods for Large Models on Heterogeneous Clusters (2024.01-2027.12, Principal Investigator)
- **Innovation Talent Program**: Memory Optimization for Large Model Training (2025.01-2027.12, Principal Investigator)

## Publications

- **Tang, Y.**, Li, Q., Yin, L., Li, D., Zhang, Y., Wang, C., Lu, K. (2024). Delta: Memory-efficient training via dynamic fine-grained recomputation and swapping. *ACM Transactions on Architecture and Code Optimization*, 21(4), 1-25. [SCI, CCF-A]

- **Tang, Y.**, Yin, L., Li, Q., Zhu, H., Li, H., Zhang, X., Li, J. (2025). Koala: Efficient Pipeline Training through Automated Schedule Searching on Domain-Specific Language. *ACM Transactions on Architecture and Code Optimization*, 22(2), 1-25. [SCI, CCF-A]

- **Tang, Y.**, Qiao, L., Yin, L., Liang, P., Shen, A., Yang, Z., Li, D. (2025). Training large-scale language models with limited GPU memory: a survey. *Frontiers of Information Technology & Electronic Engineering*, 26(3), 309-331. [SCI]

- **Tang, Y.**, Kan, Z., Sun, D., Qiao, L., Xiao, J., Lai, Z., Li, D. (2020). ADMMiRNN: Training RNN with stable convergence via an efficient ADMM approach. *ECML PKDD*, 3-18. [CCF-B]

- **Liang, P.**, **Tang, Y.**, Zhang, X., Bai, Y., Su, T., Lai, Z., Li, D. (2023). A survey on auto-parallelism of large-scale deep learning training. *IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems*, 34(8), 2377-2390. [SCI, CCF-A]

## Academic Services

- **Reviewer**: ACL, AAAI, ICML
- **Committee Member**: CCF Computer Architecture Specialized Committee

::::
